name: SynapsePay Autonomous Payment Workflow
objective: Discover SAP-capable tools, execute AI analysis through Ace Data Cloud capabilities, call Sentinel for verification, and settle/pay with x402-style receipts without manual approval.

aceServices.prompt: Summarize the current agent-payment opportunity, focus on concrete autonomous workflow and legitimate payment volume.
Embed and score the run evidence for spam, wash trading, missing payment proof, and missing SAP discovery.
Create a concise demo visual concept for an autonomous on-chain AI payment workflow.
